decisions.briefing: NASDAQ slipped -0.8% while the S&P 500 was flat — a classic neutral-to-slightly-risk-off session with no clear directional conviction. Despite $577 cash and four open slots, strategy memory is clear: this is not a risk-on setup. The four score-100 candidates (CAR, NKTR, AUGO, CRSP) all carry all four momentum signals and are genuinely compelling, but they'll still be there when the market gives a green light. Holding dry powder and waiting for NASDAQ confirmation (+2% or better) before deploying.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. markets opened the July 4th holiday week with a split session: the S&P 500 held flat as defensive and value sectors absorbed rotation out of technology, while the NASDAQ dipped -0.8% as profit-taking hit high-multiple growth names ahead of a shortened trading week. Volume was lighter than usual due to the pre-holiday half-day dynamic, which amplified price moves without strong institutional conviction behind them. With no major catalysts expected before markets close early on July 3rd, traders positioned cautiously rather than adding risk.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股在七月四日獨立紀念日假期前夕呈現分化走勢：標普500指數收平，防禦性板塊與價值股吸納資金輪動流入；那斯達克指數則因高估值成長股遭逢獲利了結而下滑0.8%。由於假期縮短交易日，市場成交量明顯萎縮，導致價格波動在缺乏機構明確方向感的情況下被放大。投資者普遍採取觀望態勢，傾向降低持倉風險以應對節假日流動性偏低的環境。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Dry powder refers to cash or liquid assets held in reserve, ready to deploy when the right opportunity appears. Keeping dry powder is a deliberate strategy — it avoids forcing trades in unfavorable conditions and ensures capital is available when high-conviction setups emerge, such as a strong risk-on day with broad market participation.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「乾火藥」（Dry Powder）在投資術語中指投資者保留的現金或高流動性資產，隨時準備在合適時機進場部署。刻意持有現金並非無所作為，而是一種主動的風險控管策略——避免在市場方向不明時強行建倉，確保資金能在真正具高勝算的行情出現時（例如那斯達克強勢上漲、市場明顯Risk-On的日子）迅速把握機會。
